global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent discount message and a call to action.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: Placeholder image
elements.description: A blank, gray square representing an image placeholder, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Discount announcement
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button with white text saying 'Try for free' positioned below the headline.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The text 'ZenDrop' appears in a small, bold font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text located at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: The text 'UGC' in a small font appears just below the logo in the top left corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the image placeholder is in the middle, and the CTA is below the headline.
